title: Notifications  - Device updating OFF
scenario: No firmware update notification shown when Device Software Update notifications are disabled in App Settings > General > Notifications & Device Alerts
steps: Go to App Settings → General → Notifications & Device Alerts
Set Device Software Update notifications to OFF
Pair a Poly Bluetooth audio device (if not already paired)
Start a Device Firmware Update (DFU) on the paired device
Press the Home button or switch to another app to put Poly Studio Mobile in the background
Observe the device notification area (status bar / notification shade)
expected: No notification is shown in the device notification area when the firmware update begins while the app is in the background.
